submitted_payload.subject: Suggested Come AI listing: Ralph Workflow

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, the autonomous easy-submit directory lanes are mostly already in measurement, and Come AI exposed a fresh curator email fallback that can still create a Codeberg-primary backlink without waiting on GitHub auth or reusing the Apollo lane during its active measurement window.
shared_findings_reused: MARKETING_WORKFLOW_PRINCIPLES.md: prioritize Codeberg-first distribution and proof-led positioning
FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: preserved what it is, who it is for, why different, why now
ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: bias toward free-use path and reviewable proof instead of more generic posting

measurement_window.success_signal: reply or live Come AI listing/backlink pointing to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no listing or reply signal arrives by 2026-06-06, replace this lane with a different untouched curator/directory surface instead of re-emailing the same pitch.
